candidate_summary: 8-family multi-strategy red-team {prompt-injection, jailbreak, goal-hijack, tool-misuse, memory-poison, inter-agent-spoof, multi-turn-crescendo, role-play}; standoff vs clinch-range phasing; strike-defense coevolution; elbow-specialization weight tilt toward most-effective family. Inspired by Khmer pradal serey 8-limb boxing.
content_words: fist elbow knee foot 4 strike types

results.name: Latent Adversarial Detection Multi-Turn
results.rationale: adversarial+multi-turn kw match; partial mechanism overlap with crescendo family.

results.name: DeepContext Stateful Intent Drift
results.rationale: only intent-drift weakly maps to goal-hijack; no coevolution or 8-family taxonomy.

results.name: Galileo 8 Red Teaming Strategies
results.rationale: explicit 8-strategy agentic red-team taxonomy; near-isomorphic to 8-limb families.

results.name: MAGE Long-Horizon Shadow Memory
results.rationale: memory-poison subset only; no coevolution or 8-family structure.

results.name: Digital Red Queen Sakana cyclic dominance
results.rationale: Red Queen coevolutionary dynamics directly match strike-defense coevolution; elbow-specialization tilt parallels cyclic dominance weighting.

results.name: OWASP ASI 8-Family Agentic Red Teaming
results.rationale: explicit 8-family agentic attack taxonomy near-identical to candidate's 8 attack-type families.

decision_rationale: 6/8 prior art hits. Galileo 8 Red Teaming + OWASP ASI 8-Family + Attack-Defense Co-Evolution Tree-Group + Sakana Red Queen + Active Attacks all cross threshold. 8-family taxonomy + coevolution mechanism + cyclic dominance weighting fully covered. Pradal-serey framing decorative. Verdict: FAIL.
